trading.notes: Execution allowlist expanded to support the full multi-bot symbol set; actual live trading is still controlled by per-bot enabled state in bots.json.

positionSizing.notes: Effective position notional is derived from accountPercent and leverage.

riskControls.notes: Duplicate/stale signal controls are scaffolded here for later enforcement. Zero values are placeholders and should not enable enforcement until defined.

takeProfit.notes: Demo-validation profile: TP1 at 0.4% and TP2 at 0.8% to sit outside short-term BTC noise while keeping outcomes observable in test runs.

stopLoss.notes: triggerPercent is overridden per-bot by MDX profile at runtime. safetyMarginPercent is added on top of the MDX SL to set the Bybit native position-level stop — the last-resort safety net if software management fails.

breakEven.notes: Demo-validation profile: break-even arms only after a 0.3% favorable move so it confirms momentum before protecting the position.

dca.notes: DCA is strategically important but intentionally scaffolded only in Sprint 3. Strategy values to be defined later.

s3.notes: Shadow-mode scoring only. No execution changes. supportResistance is stubbed at neutral weight 0 in v1.

priceMonitoring.notes: samplingIntervalMs can be raised later to reduce storage volume for longer-running deployments.

reconciliation.notes: Backstop reconciler. Validated by replay (4 historical BE-stops) and live synthetic Bot5 test.
